name: TAC S

description.consumer:
A socket that fits the system.

The TAC S is a power socket built for the TAC ecosystem — matching your switches in finish and material, and smart when it needs to be.
description.technical:
A modular 6A power socket designed for integration within the TAC Tile system. Not a standalone smart socket — smart control requires connection to a TAC load button channel or a compatible retrofit relay module.

Key Specifications
- Rating: 6A
- Materials: PP or AG glass
- Colours: Black, White, Gold
- Installation: Wall-mounted modular

⚠ Not smart by itself. Smart control requires a TAC load channel or compatible retrofit relay module.

specs.summary: Type: Non-smart 3-pin Universal Socket with Switch | Input Voltage: 110–240V AC 50/60Hz | Product Size: 86 × 86 × 10.5 mm | Bottom Shell Depth: 28mm | Installation: 86 mounting box (depth >50mm) | Working Temperature: -10°C to +60°C | Working Humidity: ≤95% RH (non-condensing)
specs.compatibility: TAC smart switch system or retrofit relay module

limitations: Not a smart socket by itself. Smart control requires a TAC load channel or compatible retrofit relay module. Materials: PP or AG glass. Colours: Black, White, Gold.
dependencies: TAC load channel or compatible retrofit relay for smart control
